goal: subgroup_maps_to_one_raw[G, H](phi, n) = forall(x0: G) { n.contains(x0) implies phi(x0) = H.1 }

p.c: function[T0: Group, T2: Group](x0: Subgroup[T0], x1: T0 -> T2) { forall(x2: T0) { not x2 ∈ x0 or x1(x2) = T2.1 } = subgroup_maps_to_one_raw[T0, T2](x1, x0) }[G, H](n, phi)
function[T0: Group, T1: Group] { forall(x0: Subgroup[T0], x1: T0 -> T1) { forall(x2: T0) { not x2 ∈ x0 or x1(x2) = T1.1 } = subgroup_maps_to_one_raw[T0, T1](x1, x0) } }
not subgroup_maps_to_one_raw[G, H](phi, n) or forall(x0: G) { not x0 ∈ n or H.1 = phi(x0) } = true
(forall(x0: G) { not (x0 ∈ n and H.1 != phi(x0)) or not subgroup_maps_to_one_raw[G, H](phi, n) })
(forall(x0: G) { not (x0 ∈ n and H.1 != phi(x0)) })
not forall(x0: G) { not x0 ∈ n or H.1 = phi(x0) } or subgroup_maps_to_one_raw[G, H](phi, n)
(forall(x0: G) { not x0 ∈ n or H.1 = phi(x0) } = true)
(forall(x0: G) { not (x0 ∈ n and H.1 != phi(x0)) })
function(x0: G) { not (x0 ∈ n and H.1 != phi(x0)) }(a)
not a ∈ n or H.1 = phi(a)
